title: AgentDefinition
description: Canonical definition schema for an Enterprise SDD AI agent.

description.description: One-to-three sentence description of the agent's purpose and responsibilities.

tools.description: Minimal sufficient set of tools the agent requires. Core tools are validated by enum; module-contributed tools (e.g. integration-specific MCP tools) are allowed via the open string type.

anyOf.description: Module-contributed tool (e.g. 'githubRepo', 'mcp-atlassian/jira_get_issue'). Installed by a module at runtime.

model-tier.description: Abstract model tier. Resolved to a concrete model via Article VI of the constitution.

instructions.description: List of instruction file paths that are always loaded by this agent.

handoffs.description: Possible handoff transitions to other agents.

label.description: Short label shown in the UI for this handoff option.

prompt.description: Prompt text pre-filled when initiating the handoff.

send.description: If false (default), the user must confirm before the prompt is sent.
